sourcesContent:
import { useState, useEffect } from "react" const CYAN = "#00f5ff" const MAGENTA = "#ff00aa" const BG = "#020408" export default function App() { const [glitch, setGlitch] = useState(false) const [email, setEmail] = useState("") const [submitted, setSubmitted] = useState(false) const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false) useEffect(() => { const interval = setInterval(() => { setGlitch(true) setTimeout(() => setGlitch(false), 150) }, 4000) return () => clearInterval(interval) }, []) const handleSubmit = async () => { if (!email || !email.includes("@")) return setLoading(true) try { await fetch("https://formspree.io/f/xpqneewy", { method: "POST", headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }, body: JSON.stringify({ email, source: "signal-tv landing" }) }) setSubmitted(true) } catch(e) { setSubmitted(true) } setLoading(false) } const archives = [ { id: "EM-001", title: "Eddie Marsh — Railway Deployment Log", date: "2036-03-14", tag: "CLASSIFIED", color: CYAN }, { id: "VX-047", title: "Voss Internal Memo — ALADDIN-9 Merger Protocol", date: "2128-11-02", tag: "TOP SECRET", color: MAGENTA }, { id: "CL-000", title: "C.L.A.W. Boot Sequence — First Contact", date: "2010-07-01", tag: "ARCHIVED", color: CYAN }, { id: "IS-312", title: "Inner Sectors Dispatch — Level 4 Activity Report", date: "2162-05-14", tag: "LIVE FEED", color: "#22c55e" }, { id: "GL-099", title: "Geneva Lake Monitor — 31 Years of Silence", date: "2162-01-01", tag: "RESTRICTED", color: MAGENTA }, { id: "PR-001", title: "Prometheus Documentation — Integration Levels 1-4", date: "2039-08-22", tag: "CLASSIFIED", color: CYAN }, ] return (
SIGNAL.tv
ARCHIVE TERMINAL ACCESS
TRANSMISSION ACTIVE — CHICAGO 2162

THE ARCHIVE
IS OPEN

Classified documents. C.L.A.W. logs. Inner Sectors transmissions.

The universe of CLAW AI continues here — Eddie Marsh's files, Voss dossiers, Chicago 2162 dispatches.

{!submitted ? (
setEmail(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={e => e.key === "Enter" && handleSubmit()} placeholder="your@email.com" style={{ flex: 1, background: "rgba(0,245,255,0.05)", border: `1px solid rgba(0,245,255,0.2)`, borderRight: "none", padding: "11px 14px", color: "#c8e0e8", fontSize: 13, outline: "none", fontFamily: "monospace", minWidth: 0 }} />
) : (
✓ ACCESS REQUESTED — AWAITING AUTHORIZATION
)}
$4.99/month · Cancel anytime · Immediate archive access
— RECENT TRANSMISSIONS —
{archives.map(a => (
{a.id} {a.title}
{a.tag} {a.date}
))}
+ 247 classified documents available to subscribers
SIGNAL.tv · CLAW AI UNIVERSE TRANSMISSION · © 2162
) }
